title: NoLeaves
description: Transparent Leaves for Cutting Down some Big Trees
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58b16049f8f006c10b269ecbd0702fd0a198966c.png)
## What is NoLeaves?

NoLeaves is a resource pack that makes the foliage of trees transparent

## Why do I need it?

Lets imagine that you live in mangrove swamps and you need to make some room for your amazing and creative buldings. You burned a couple of trees to do this, but some of the leaves is still floating in the air because of the remaining logs. Thats why I created this resource pack! NoLeaves is convenient to use for cutting down large trees, allowing you to easily find unfinished pieces of wood that do not allow the leaves to crumble.
